# Music

When I work I play music at a low volume. I rarely pick songs with lyrics. It is just that when there is a quiet sound around me, my mind settles down.

I tend to play the same songs over and over. Hunting for new ones is fun too, but a familiar song lets me concentrate better in the end.

I do not have any strong rules about it. Still, wrapped in that sound, my time alone feels a little richer to me.
